allow: Bash(pdftotext "A Decade of Slug - Eric Lengyel.pdf" /tmp/a_decade.txt)
Bash(node -e "console.log\(typeof atob, typeof FontFace, typeof fetch\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import fontTools, brotli, zopfli; print\('fontTools', fontTools.__version__\); print\('brotli OK'\); print\('zopfli OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\); var html=fs.readFileSync\('examples/v7/index.html','utf8'\); var m=html.match\(/<script>\\s*\\\(async function[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/\); if\(!m\){console.log\('no inline script found'\); process.exit\(0\)} var js=m[0].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\); try { new Function\(js\); console.log\('v7 inline JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\){console.log\('v7 inline JS error:',e.message\)}")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\('fs'\); var html=fs.readFileSync\('examples/v6/index.html','utf8'\); var m=html.match\(/<script>\\s*\\\(async function[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/\); if\(!m\){console.log\('no inline script found'\); process.exit\(0\)} var js=m[0].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\); try { new Function\(js\); console.log\('v6 inline JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\){console.log\('v6 inline JS error:',e.message\)}")
